title: Section 25D
content: 1[25D. Special auditor.—Notwithstanding anything contained in sections 19C, 23A, 25, 25A and 25B, the Central Government may, at any time, appoint such auditor as it deems fit as a special auditor to examine and report on the accounts of the Corporation, and such auditor shall have the same rights of access to the books of account and vouchers of the Corporation and entitlement to require information and explanation from the officers of the Corporation as an auditor of the Corporation has under section 25B.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 13 of 2021, s. 137, for section 25 (w.e.f. 30-6-2021).
